summary.publicSummaryLocation: public release issue or PR URL
summary.releaseGateStatusFile: private v0 release gate status JSON

github-app.notes: Create the production 6529bot GitHub App before broad release.

aws-ledger.notes: Apply and verify the ledger schema in the operator AWS account.

iam-and-secrets.notes: Review least-privilege IAM policies and secret custody before enabling production.

security-intake.notes: Enable GitHub private vulnerability reporting or record an equivalent private security intake channel before broad community release.

repository-rulesets.notes: Verify live GitHub main branch protection, required PR checks, release tag rulesets, and bypass posture before public dogfood tags.

app-server-runtime.notes: Deploy the central App server or explicitly mark the release local/dogfood-only.

container-publish-plan.notes: Render and review the dry-run container publish plan before treating container image evidence as release-ready.

production-deployment-plan.notes: Render and review the production deployment plan with concrete host, image, workspace, and worker-dispatch installation id before live handoff.

budget-and-pricing.notes: Example only: defer central budget-policy apply evidence until dogfood caps are reviewed; model price source verification is tracked separately.

model-pricing.notes: Review provider/model price sources, catalog default lane coverage, source freshness, stale/zero-price overrides, admin model-price status, and any release-note disclosure before relying on price-row estimates.

worker-dispatch-credentials.notes: Review worker dispatch credential posture before enabling non-noop worker traffic.

alert-delivery-plan.notes: Render and review the alert delivery plan with concrete production bot origin, private workspace, delivery mode, and operator channel before scheduled alert delivery.

worker-and-alerts.notes: Enable one worker path and verify scheduled operator alert delivery after the alert delivery plan is reviewed.

dashboard-deployment-plan.notes: Render and review the dashboard deployment plan with concrete 6529.io origin, production bot origin, private workspace, and auth-check URL before public or private dashboard exposure.

6529-io-surfaces.notes: Wire public and private 6529.io surfaces after the dashboard deployment plan is reviewed, or explicitly defer them.

6529-io-public-disclosure.notes: Review public dashboard repo/org disclosure allowlists before exposing named summaries.

6529-io-private-admin-auth.notes: Review the 6529.io auth-check URL, wallet allowlist evidence, and server-side HMAC bridge before exposing private admin dashboards.

dogfood-evidence.notes: Dogfood on at least one trusted 6529 repository with conservative limits.

release-tag-plan.notes: Render and review the dry-run release tag plan from clean synced main and completed release notes before creating any tag or GitHub Release.

release-decision.notes: Operator release decision is not made in the public example.
